verses.text: Pasian aw, Zion-ah nangmah phat dingin kilawm a, nangma tunga thuciamsate hong kitungsak ding hi
Thungetna a zapa na hi a, mawhna hangin nangma kiangah mi khempeuh hong pai ding uh hi
Ka mawhnate un kote hong zawh ciangin, nangmah in tuate na hong maisak hi
Nangma inn-ah a om dingin na teel na lakte mi nuamsa ahi hi. Nangma biakinn siangtho, na innsunga hoihna tawh kote ka lungkim ding uh hi
Tuipi gamla pente leh leimong khempeuhte' lamet, kote a hong honkhia Pasian
a thahatna tawh mualte a bawl, vangliatna tawh a kidim
tuipi gingte, tuihualte, mi gamlumte a daisakpa aw

leimong peka omte in na hihna limte a kihtakna dingun a kihtakhuai gamtatna zangin, nong hotkhiatna tawh kote' ngetna nong pia hi. Nisuahna leh nitumna kikalah a om mi khempeuhte lungdamna tawh a awng dingin na bawl hi
Nangmah in leitung enin, guah na hong zusak a, leitung a hoihna nakpi takin na behlap hi. Pasian' gunpi tui tawh kidim a, leitungah an na piangsak hi. Tua bangin nangmah in na khempeuh na bawlkhol hi
Tu-ma-kuakte khempeuh tui tampi tak na buak a, leivumte zalhmai-in, guahtui tawh na nipsak a, a po kungte thupha na pia hi
Nangma hauhna tawh kum na phasak a, na leeng paina khempeuhah sathau a taak hi
Ganhing tatna, a noptuak mahmah munte-ah ganhing honte omin, mualte khempeuh zong lungdamna tawh kidim a
gamlak lonona munte tuuhon tawh kizemin, kuampite an tawh kidim a, amaute lungdamin awngin la a sa khawm uh hi.
